posts.raw_content:
Honest opinion as a three time Trump voter.  First off, the most important thing Trump should have been laser focused on is the  US economy, energy/gas prices, food/housing prices and creating a massively booming economy.

His number one priority from day 1 should have been drill baby, drill and doing whatever it takes to kick start the economy.  Right now we should be winning so much we are tired of winning, but honestly I don't notice any difference... in fact things may even be more expensive overall (like the $8 grapes I bought today).

If the Iran war ends like it is playing out today, I consider it a failure as now the supreme leader is younger and likely more determined (if he's alive - who knows?).  Seems like Iranians have no interest in an uprising, so that's another fail.

The sad thing is this has really illustrated how dependent we on on the Strait of Hormuz and that area for oil.  But what is Trump doing in the USA to counter it?

Unless a miracle happens, gas and other prices collapse and the economy massively turns around very soon (as in EARLY summer), Republicans will lose the mid terms, Vance won't be elected and more than likely the next Democrat president will be even worse than Obama, Biden and Kamala combined.

I know this post will piss some people off, but I'm going to keep a screenshot of it so I can say see I told you so later.

President Trump, FIX THE ECONOMY AND COST OF LIVING!
posts.author: FartOnLibtards
posts.title: Unpopular MAGA Opinion: Trump needs to adjust course
posts.content:
Honest opinion as a three time Trump voter. First off, the most important thing Trump should have been laser focused on is the US economy, energy/gas prices, food/housing prices and creating a massively booming economy.

His number one priority from day 1 should have been drill baby, drill and doing whatever it takes to kick start the economy. Right now we should be winning so much we are tired of winning, but honestly I don't notice any difference... in fact things may even be more expensive overall (like the $8 grapes I bought today).

If the Iran war ends like it is playing out today, I consider it a failure as now the supreme leader is younger and likely more determined (if he's alive - who knows?). Seems like Iranians have no interest in an uprising, so that's another fail.

The sad thing is this has really illustrated how dependent we on on the Strait of Hormuz and that area for oil. But what is Trump doing in the USA to counter it?

Unless a miracle happens, gas and other prices collapse and the economy massively turns around very soon (as in EARLY summer), Republicans will lose the mid terms, Vance won't be elected and more than likely the next Democrat president will be even worse than Obama, Biden and Kamala combined.

I know this post will piss some people off, but I'm going to keep a screenshot of it so I can say see I told you so later.

President Trump, FIX THE ECONOMY AND COST OF LIVING!
